regression_matrix.label: Section 12-39 job contract default request set
Section 40-41 temporary manifest executor policy
Section 42-45 executor capability matrix
Section 46-48/61 durable executor gate matrix
Section 51 durable authoring enable contract
notes: Section 51 separates target allowlist, overwrite/rename, rollback readiness, and ownership marker gates.
It does not enable durable save/delete/rename/live authoring.

regression_matrix.label: Section 52 durable rollback ownership marker contract
notes: Rollback/delete is authorized only for executor-created assets with a matching ownership marker.
Section 52 still does not execute delete or durable save commands.

regression_matrix.label: Section 53 durable executor dry-run plan
notes: Dry-run plan records durable execution intent without live commands.
Execution command plan must remain empty until a later durable release.

regression_matrix.label: Section 54 durable save validation simulator
notes: Simulator evaluates save prerequisites without save=true or save_asset.
Failed conditions must keep durable save closed.

regression_matrix.label: Section 55 durable canary prep contract
notes: Canary prep reserves a narrow target under /Game/_MCP_Temp/DurableCanary.
Prep does not approve live durable canary execution.

regression_matrix.label: Section 56 durable canary approval gate
notes: Canary approval must be explicit and scoped to /Game/_MCP_Temp/DurableCanary.
Approval gate still does not open live durable canary execution.

regression_matrix.label: Section 57 durable canary live preflight
notes: Canary live preflight may only run a read-only asset-exists check.
The contract still denies canary execution, save, delete, and cleanup commands.

regression_matrix.label: Section 61 durable canary bridge refresh contract
notes: Bridge refresh and fresh read-only canary evidence are required before any future canary execution.
Missing bridge evidence keeps execution closed rather than enabling durable authoring.

regression_matrix.label: Section 62 durable live evidence refresh contract
notes: Stored live evidence must include a fresh Section 57 canary read-only preflight before future canary execution.
The current release boundary treats missing canary evidence as refresh-pending and executor-closed.

regression_matrix.label: Section 63 durable executor implementation review contract
notes: The disabled durable executor boundary has been reviewed as closed.
This review does not approve live durable implementation, save, delete, rename, or canary execution.

regression_matrix.label: Section 64 durable canary command allowlist contract
notes: The canary allowlist contains only the read-only asset-exists command.
Save, delete, rename, cleanup, authoring, and canary execution remain forbidden.

regression_matrix.label: Section 65 durable canary creation boundary contract
notes: Canary prep and approval are present, but create_blueprint remains outside the live allowlist.
No canary creation, save, delete, cleanup, or executor opening is permitted.

regression_matrix.label: Section 66 durable ownership marker write/readback proof contract
notes: Ownership marker policy is ready, but write/readback proof has not been performed.
Cleanup and delete remain disabled until a verified executor-created marker exists.

regression_matrix.label: Section 67 durable rollback cleanup proof contract
notes: Recovery matrix is ready, but cleanup proof is blocked until ownership marker write/readback passes.
Delete and cleanup commands remain disabled, including preexisting asset delete.

regression_matrix.label: Section 68 durable save gate final enable review contract
notes: The save gate has been reviewed against current prerequisites.
Missing overwrite/rollback/live preflight/save validation keeps save=true and save_asset disabled.

regression_matrix.label: Section 69 durable live canary rehearsal readiness contract
notes: Live canary rehearsal readiness has been reviewed and remains false.
No creation, save, cleanup, or durable executor command is attempted.

regression_matrix.label: Section 58 durable canary recovery matrix
notes: Recovery scenarios are report-only.
Cleanup/delete remain disabled until a later explicit release.

regression_matrix.label: Section 59 release boundary v2 consolidation
notes: Section 51-58 contracts are present and blocking-safe.
Durable authoring remains disabled; only read-only preflight evidence is allowed.

regression_matrix.label: Section 60 MVP decision contract
notes: Temporary planner-safe Blueprint authoring is the MVP-ready scope.
Durable Blueprint authoring remains contracts-only and disabled.

regression_matrix.label: Section 70 durable Blueprint authoring release decision
notes: Section 61-69 safety contracts are report-safe, but they do not enable durable authoring.
Temporary Blueprint authoring remains the ready MVP; durable Blueprint authoring stays disabled.

regression_matrix.label: Section 71 durable bridge recovery readiness contract
notes: Local UnrealMCP recovery inputs are present, but this row does not probe or open the bridge.
A later live read-only retry must remain separate from durable save/delete/rename enablement.

regression_matrix.label: Section 72 durable canary read-only retry envelope contract
notes: The retry envelope is defined, but live retry is not allowed or performed by offline release review.
Bridge reachability and explicit live retry invocation remain separate prerequisites.

regression_matrix.label: Section 73 durable canary read-only retry result admission contract
notes: No live retry result is admitted by the offline release boundary.
A future result must be explicitly authorized, schema-matched, read-only, and free of authoring commands.

regression_matrix.label: Section 74 durable canary rehearsal promotion barrier contract
notes: An admitted read-only retry result cannot promote itself to live canary rehearsal.
A separate durable rehearsal execution release is still required before any live authoring command.

regression_matrix.label: Section 75 durable canary rehearsal execution release contract
notes: The execution release contract is defined, but no release record is present.
Even a scoped release record would still need a separate live runner release before commands run.

regression_matrix.label: Section 76 durable canary live runner envelope contract
notes: The live runner envelope is defined, but no runner plan or start action is present.
Forbidden save/delete/rename/cleanup commands stay outside the live runner envelope.

regression_matrix.label: Section 77 durable canary live runner start contract
notes: The runner start contract is defined, but no operator start record is present.
Command dispatch remains behind a separate release; no live commands are emitted.

regression_matrix.label: Section 78 durable canary live command dispatch release contract
notes: The command dispatch release contract is defined, but no dispatch release record is present.
